exploration_notes: Found 3 defects in the tRPC router file. All three mutation handlers (setUserState, setTeamState, setOrganizationState) use isOptInFeature() for slug validation, which only checks the allowlist but ignores the new scope configuration. They should also call isFeatureAllowedForScope() with the appropriate scope ('user', 'team', 'org'). Without this, scope-restricted features pass the router check but fail in the service with ErrorWithCode (not TRPCError), producing incorrect 500 errors instead of
